paper_title: Three-Dimensional Integrated Geo-Static Modeling for Prospect Identification and Reserve Estimation in the Middle Miocene Multi-Reservoirs: A Case Study from Amal Field, Southern Gulf of Suez Province

methods.description: Process for creating a 3D geo-static model using seismic lines and well logging data to understand and model the reservoirs of interest.

steps.description: Ten 2D seismic lines in the depth domain along with logging data from five wells were combined for the 3D geo-static modeling.
steps.searchable_summary: combine 2D seismic lines and well logging data for 3D modeling

steps.description: Several simulation approaches, such as the sequential Gaussian simulation technique, were proposed to comprehend and model the reservoirs.
steps.searchable_summary: apply sequential Gaussian simulation for reservoir modeling

methods.description: Process for identifying lithology of formations using wireline logs.

steps.description: Lithology identification was constructed based on four wireline logs: GR, density, neutron, and sonic.
steps.searchable_summary: identify lithology using GR, density, neutron, and sonic logs

steps.description: Sandstone was interpreted based on the low GR and density-neutron crossover.
steps.searchable_summary: interpret sandstone using low GR and density-neutron crossover

methods.description: Process for interpreting seismic data to map subsurface structures and estimate oil and gas accumulations.

steps.description: Seismic data interpretation was initiated by tracking seismic reflectors and structural elements in the depth domain.
steps.searchable_summary: track seismic reflectors and structural elements

steps.description: The seismic interpretation outputs were used as input data in fault modeling, pillar gridding, and horizon modeling.
steps.searchable_summary: use seismic interpretation for fault modeling and gridding

methods.description: Analysis of logging data to estimate petrophysical parameters of wells.

steps.description: Logging data were analyzed to estimate total porosity, effective porosity, Vsh, Sw, hydrocarbon saturation, gross thickness, and net thickness.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze logging data for petrophysical parameters

steps.description: Vsh was calculated from GR logs and scaled up using arithmetic computation.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate and scale up Vsh from GR logs
